generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance TrapezoidalChassisActuationFE : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuation subsystem interfacing with the lower-level chassis for steering and propulsion control based on Digital Twin-generated commands"
]

instance MotorActuation : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Converts speed commands from Digital Twin to voltage commands for Vedder Electronic Speed Controller controlling vehicle propulsion"
]

instance SteeringServoActuation : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Adjusts vehicle orientation via lower-level chassis steering mechanism based on Digital Twin steering commands"
]

instance EmergencyBrakingActuator : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Implements immediate braking via speed controller triggered by remote management commands from Digital Twin Control Panel"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "3D point cloud sensor (Hokuyo UST-10LX) providing object detection and tracking data for vehicle proximity"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "2D/3D visual sensor (Intel D435i) capturing environmental context supplemented by LiDAR point cloud processing"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraData
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensors continuously monitoring real-time speed and steering angle data for ego vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateData
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Compute platform (NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano) hosting ROS2-based data processing pipelines for real-time sensor fusion"
]

// C4: Data Transmission
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDAR
    base:desc "3D point cloud data streams from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR processed via DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering"
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDepthCamera
    base:desc "2D/3D visual data streams from Intel D435i depth camera for environmental context"
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
    base:desc "Real-time speed and steering angle data streams from onboard vehicle sensors"
]

instance SensorFusionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano
    base:desc "Processed sensor fusion data combining LiDAR, depth camera, and vehicle state data via ROS2 pipelines"
]

// C5: Data Models
instance PointCloudModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D point cloud model derived from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR and Intel D435i depth camera data, processed via DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANProcessingEnabler, KalmanFilteringEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle state model capturing speed and steering angle data from onboard sensors"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622 performance class I Adaptive Cruise Control model implementing lead vehicle detection and speed computation logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CloudComputationEnabler, MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance DataStorageModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Historical data storage model using SQL database for timeseries and reporting data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabaseEnabler
]

// C6: Data Roles
instance DataCollection : DTDFVocab:DataRole [
    base:desc "Feature responsible for gathering object tracks and ego vehicle state data for real-time visualization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance Reporting : DTDFVocab:DataRole [
    base:desc "Feature generating human-readable reports from stored SQL database timeseries data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabaseEnabler
]

instance VisualizationPreProcessing : DTDFVocab:DataRole [
    base:desc "Feature processing 3D visualization pre-processing for real-time rendering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2VisualizationEnabler
]

// C7: Enablers
instance DBSCANProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering implementation for point cloud data processing and object detection"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudModel
]

instance KalmanFilteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kalman filtering implementation for object tracking and state estimation"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudModel
]

instance ROS2DataProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for data processing pipelines (unit conversions, message alignment, formatting)"
    DTDFVocab:enables VehicleStateModel, DataCollection
]

instance ROS2VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based 3D rendering system for real-time visualization components"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationPreProcessing
]

instance CloudComputationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano cloud-based computation for ACC control logic processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControlModel
]

instance SQLDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "External SQL database storage for historical data and reporting functionality"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStorageModel, Reporting
]

instance ROS2MiddlewareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 Robot Operating System 2 middleware for inter-component communication and modular architecture"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollection, VisualizationPreProcessing, MotorActuation, SteeringServoActuation
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment for complex systems modeling (point cloud clustering, control logic)"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControlModel
]

instance WiFiNetworkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Wi-Fi network infrastructure for latency-constrained data transmission (≤100ms end-to-end latency)"
    DTDFVocab:enables LiDARPointCloudData, DepthCameraData, VehicleStateData
]

// C8: Services
instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization service displaying ego vehicle speed, steering angle, object tracks, and projected driving path"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance HumanReadableReportingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating human-readable reports from stored SQL database timeseries data"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalReportInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service offloading ACC control logic (lead vehicle detection, speed computation) from vehicle ECUs to cloud-based DT entity"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCPerformanceInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling human-in-the-loop operation via Control Panel UI for ACC control adjustments and emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteControlAction
]

instance CyberPhysicalExperimentationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service facilitating cyber-physical experimentation using ROS2 + MATLAB/Simulink for ACC design validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationValidationInsight
]

// C9: Data
instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData, DepthCameraData
    base:desc "Derived object tracking data containing position, velocity, and size information from processed sensor data"
]

instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateData
    base:desc "Real-time ego vehicle state data including speed and steering angle measurements"
]

instance HistoricalTimeseriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData DataStorageModel
    base:desc "Historical timeseries data stored in SQL database for reporting and analysis"
]

instance ControlCommandsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorActuation, SteeringServoActuation
    base:desc "Command data generated by Digital Twin for motor and steering actuation"
]

instance EmergencyBrakingCommand : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData EmergencyBrakingActuator
    base:desc "Immediate braking command data triggered by remote management system"
]

// C10: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of vehicle state and environmental context for operator monitoring"
]

instance HistoricalReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human-readable reports generated from historical timeseries data for performance analysis"
]

instance ACCPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Performance metrics and validation results from ACC control logic execution"
]

instance RemoteControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Human-in-the-loop control actions via Control Panel UI (speed adjustments, emergency braking)"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SimulationValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results and validation outputs from cyber-physical experimentation"
]

// C11: Environment
instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains TrapezoidalChassisActuationFE, HokuyoLiDAR, IntelDepthCamera, VehicleStateSensor
]

instance DigitalTwinSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PointCloudModel, VehicleStateModel, ACCControlModel, DataStorageModel,
        DataCollection, Reporting, VisualizationPreProcessing, CloudComputationEnabler
]

instance ControlPanelEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains EmergencyBrakingActuator, RemoteManagementService, RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The **virtual-to-physical interaction** includes:
  - **Control commands** from the DT’s **Digital Twin Entity** to the physical twin:
    - **ACC Control FE**: Computes desired speed based on lead vehicle distance (per ISO 15622) and sends commands to the **Actuation FE**.
    - **Remote management commands** via the **Control Panel UI**:
      - Enable/disable ACC.
      - Set desired speed.
      - Trigger emergency braking (via speed controller).
  - **Actuation FE** translates commands into **motor voltage commands** and steering servo adjustments, executed by the vehicle’s hardware.
  - **Data Translation FE** ensures compatibility between DT and physical twin communication protocols (e.g., ROS2 message types, unit conversions)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time-scale adheres to:
  - **Latency Constraint**: End-to-end latency between vehicle and DT Entity is **≤100 ms** (3GPP TS 22.185).
  - **Clock Synchronization**: Components must synchronize clocks with **≤100 ms accuracy** for event ordering and data integrity.
  - **Processing Frequency**: Object tracking and data updates occur at **real-time rates** (no explicit frequency specified, but aligned with 100 ms latency bounds)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin constellation consists of:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Deployed on the **1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle** (Jetson Orin Nano hardware).
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Deployed externally (cloud-based) to handle computation offloading and data storage.
  - **User Entity**: Hosts **3D Visualization FE** (onboard/remote) and **Control Panel FE** (remote management).
  - **Cross-System Entity**: Manages **Data Translation FE** for inter-entity communication (ROS2 intra-entity, Wi-Fi inter-entity)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates across the following lifecycle stages:
  - **Design Phase**: Development of DT architecture (ISO 23247-based) and requirements (e.g., real-time data monitoring, remote management).
  - **Manufacturing Phase**: Retrofitting the **1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle** with autonomy hardware (Jetson, LiDAR, cameras).
  - **Operational Phase**: Real-time monitoring, computation offloading, and remote control of ACC during vehicle operation.
  The DT represents the **as-operated** state of the physical twin, enabling cyber-physical experimentation and validation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The **fidelity and validity** are addressed through:
  - **Verification**:
    - **Latency compliance**: Ensured **≤100ms end-to-end latency** (3GPP TS 22.185).
    - **Clock synchronization**: **≤100ms accuracy** (critical for distributed systems).
    - **Data integrity**: **Data Translation FE** ensures message alignment and unit conversions.
  - **Validation**:
    - **ACC compliance**: Implemented **ISO 15622** performance class I control logic.
    - **Real-world testing**: Deployed on **1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle** with **LiDAR, depth camera, and ROS2 middleware**.
    - **Uncertainty handling**:
      - **Sensor noise**: Mitigated via **Kalman filtering** for object tracking.
      - **Latency variability**: Monitored via **ROS2 time synchronization** tools.
  - **Uncertainty sources**:
    - **Sensing**: LiDAR/depth camera calibration errors (addressed via **DBSCAN clustering**).
    - **Actuation**: Motor voltage command precision (aligned with **Vedder Electronic Speed Controller** specifications)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The **technical network connection** includes:
  - **Intra-entity communication**:
    - **ROS2 network**: Low-latency, high-throughput inter-process communication (IPC) for **Physical Twin Entity** and **Digital Twin Entity**.
  - **Inter-entity communication**:
    - **Wi-Fi**: Point-to-point link between **DT Entity (cloud)** and **Physical Twin Entity (vehicle)**, ensuring **≤100ms latency**.
    - **Protocols**:
      - **ROS2** (for intra-entity messaging).
      - **Wi-Fi 802.11** (for inter-entity communication).
      - **Data Translation FE**: Serializes/deserializes messages (e.g., ROS2 topics) and converts units (e.g., meters to pixels)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The **DT hosting/deployment** is structured as:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**:
    - Deployed on **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano** (onboard the vehicle) for **real-time processing** (e.g., point cloud clustering, ACC control).
    - **Middleware**: ROS2 + **Robot Operating System 2 (ROS2)** for application integration.
  - **Digital Twin Entity**:
    - Hosted **externally** (cloud-based) for **computation offloading** (e.g., ACC logic, data storage).
    - **Storage**: SQL databases for **historical data** (e.g., reports, timeseries).
    - **Visualization**: **3D rendering** via ROS2-based UI components (e.g., **3D Visualization FE**).
  - **Deployment architecture**:
    - **Onboard**: Jetson devices (sensors, actuators).
    - **Offboard**: Cloud servers (data storage, computation)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following **standards**:
  1. **Digital Twin Standards**:
     - **ISO 23247**: Reference architecture (RA) adapted for automotive DTs (e.g., entity-based structure: **Physical Twin Entity**, **Digital Twin Entity**, **User Entity**).
     - **ISO/IEC 30173:2023**: Concepts and terminology (high-level, not architecture-specific).
  2. **Automotive Standards**:
     - **ISO 15622**: ACC performance requirements (performance class I).
     - **3GPP TS 22.185**: V2V communication service requirements (≤100ms latency).
  3. **Middleware Standards**:
     - **ROS2 (Robot Operating System 2)**: For inter-component communication and modularity.
     - **OPC UA (IEC 62541)**: Potential for **Data Translation FE** (not explicitly implemented but referenced as a feasible option)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety considerations include:
  - **Latency**: **≤100 ms** end-to-end latency for real-time control (critical for ACC).
  - **Clock Synchronization**: **≤100 ms accuracy** for distributed systems.
  - **Safety-Critical Nature**: DT operates in a **Human-in-the-Loop** mode (Fully Autonomous Digital Twin per Liberty to act vs. Ability to act taxonomy).
  - **Hardware Constraints**: No explicit security protocols (e.g., encryption) or fault tolerance mechanisms mentioned; focus on latency and clock sync for safety."
]
